builds.name: Valar Morghulis
builds.description: Build built around a modified Fentastic Plus skin and Redlight as its main addon  There are 2 custom user scripts in fetastic plus maintenance button.  You can restore either More widgets.zip or Less Widgets.zip .  This can be chosen based on how powerful device is.  I do not host any content and am not responsible for content obtained by 3rd party kodi addons.  Use at your own risk.
